comment: Portable app config (colors, top-N, artist aliases, grade thresholds) — safe to commit and share; no personal or machine-specific values. Per-machine settings (player name, live dir, server host) live in site.env; see site.env.example. gradeThresholds (below) makes every play's letter grade derive from its accuracy (PercentDP) via the listed cutoffs — consistent across StepMania versions/themes; REMOVE the whole gradeThresholds key to instead show the grade StepMania recorded in the bundle (mapped via the built-in tier table). Edit and rebuild: python3 build_dashboard.py.

artistAliases._comment: Map canonical display name -> [variants to merge into this group]. Auto-normalization already collapses TWICE/Twice, T-ara/T ARA, GFRIEND/G-Friend, etc. — list cross-language/cross-romanization variants here. Sub-units (TTS, T-ara N4) and collabs (Super Junior & X) are intentionally NOT merged.
